title: Starting Out
subtitle: From bare hands to your first settlement

objectives.label: Open the Chronicle
substeps: Press J at any time to open the Chronicle.
Tutorials you have seen can be replayed from there.
Don't want this guide? Unpin it in the Chronicle to hide the tracker.

objectives.label: Knap a Flint Blade
substeps: Smash gravel against stone to flake off flint.
Smash the flint again to knap a Flint Blade.

objectives.label: Craft a Flint Knife
substeps: Cut grass with the blade for plant fiber.
Cut sticks from leaves or dead bushes.
Combine stick, fiber, and blade in your inventory grid.

objectives.label: Hunt for bone
substeps: Kill animals or fish with your Flint Knife.
Bigger animals drop more bone; cows are the slowest.

objectives.label: Smash bones into Bone Blades
substeps: Smash a bone against a hard surface, just like flint.

objectives.label: Make a Crafting Stone
substeps: Pick up rocks from the ground; craft 4 into a rock block.
Use a blade or knife on the placed rock block.
Place sticks, fiber, and bone blades on it to craft your tool set.

objectives.label: Craft a Bone Axe
substeps: Browse the Crafting Stone arrows to the axe recipe.
Use the preview to auto-craft from your inventory.

objectives.label: Split Firewood
substeps: Use the Bone Axe on a lone placed log to carve a Chopping Stump.
Place logs on the stump and chop them with the axe.

objectives.label: Found your settlement
substeps: Use 4 Firewood on the ground where you want to settle.
When the campfire is ready, use it and found your settlement.
